competitions.product: Welcome to
competitions.product_info: Welcome to The Time Vault Club Where passion for horology meets opportunity. We exist to bring the world of exceptional watchmaking closer to you, from iconic Swiss craftsmanship to bespoke British design. Through our curated competitions, we give you the chance to discover and own watches most people only dream of. LIVE COMPETITION All of our prize draws are hosted live, so you can witness every moment as dream watches find new owners. With regular competitions featuring everything from iconic Swiss classics to standout modern releases, the next opportunity is always closer than you think. Longines Hydro-Conquest or £1250 Per Entry £ 10.00 Ends In 03 Days 05 Hours 04 Mins 21 Secs Tickets Remaining 334 / 399 ENTER COMPETITION VIEW ALL COMPETITIONS Every watch tells a story, will the next one be yours? competitions.product: WIN A NEO-VINTAGE ROLEX GMT-MASTER II "COKE" 16710 W/ BOX & BOOKLETS
competitions.product_info: Home – Rolex GMT-Master II “Coke” 16710 WIN A NEO-VINTAGE ROLEX GMT-MASTER II "COKE" 16710 W/ BOX & BOOKLETS Value: £8,500 Duration: 7 Days Age: Circa 1997 Max. Entries: 849 Ticket Price: £20 Live Draw: 30/06/26 The Rolex GMT-Master is one of the most iconic and popular watches ever made, and this example is a slight twist on a classic, known as the “Coke” for its red & black Coca-Cola colour palette . This 16710 GMT-Master II reference is of its best iterations, perfectly balancing vintage styling with modern practicality . This example dates to 1997 and is in very sharp, immaculate condition , accompanied by its box, booklets & tag. 77.97% SOLD 0 Tickets Sold: 662 849 77.97% 187 Tickets remaining 187/849 Tickets Remaining Time Left to End: 0 Days 5 Hours 4 Minutes 8 Seconds ENTER NOW WIN A ROLEX GMT-MASTER II "COKE" 16710 1997 ENTER NOW 77.97% SOLD 0 Tickets Sold: 662 849 77.97% 187 Tickets remaining 187/849 Tickets Remaining Time Left to End: 0 Days 5 Hours 4 Minutes 8 Seconds Value: £8,500 Duration: 7 Days Age: Circa 1997 Entries: 849 Max. Ticket Price: £20 Live Draw: 30/06/2026 The Rolex GMT-Master is one of the most iconic and popular watches ever made, and this example is a slight twist on a classic, known as the “Coke” for its red & black Coca-Cola colour palette bezel insert. This 16710 GMT-Master II reference is of its best iterations, perfectly balancing vintage styling with modern practicality . This example dates to 1997 and is in very sharp, immaculate condition , accompanied by its box, booklets & tag. #30 - The Rolex GMT-Master II "Coke" 16710 w/ Box, Booklets & Tag 1997 The History— The Example The Rolex GMT-Master II is one of the most iconic sports watches ever produced, originally developed for airline pilots travelling between time zones. This example is a slightly different take on the classic GMT formula, featuring the distinctive red and black “Coke” bezel – a configuration that has become increasingly sought after in recent years. The reference 16710 is widely regarded as one of the best GMT-Master II references, perfectly balancing vintage character with modern practicality. Powered by the Rolex calibre 3185 , it features an independently adjustable hour hand, allowing the wearer to track multiple time zones with ease. Dating to 1997 , this example is presented in exceptionally sharp, immaculate condition , with excellent case definition throughout. It is accompanied by its box, booklets and tag . A perfect GMT-Master II in one of the model’s most attractive configurations – versatile, iconic and increasingly difficult to find in such outstanding condition. ENTER NOW The First Competition of its Kind The Vintage Watch Draw is unique. We’re the first competition website dedicated to collector-grade vintage watches, backed by a trusted expert. After the initial idea over five years ago, we’re so excited to now bring this new concept to you. Curated by A Trusted Expert Our competitions are curated by Alex Stevens, a trusted & reputable vintage watch specialist with lifelong experience in the trade. 12 Month Service Warranty Every watch is fully serviced by our watchmaker & comes with a 12 month mechanical warranty, so you can enjoy your watch hassle-free. Collector-Grade Condition Every watch is meticulously curated by Alex, known for selecting only the finest, collector-grade examples in terms of condition & originality. Low & Transparent Odds We don’t flood the draw with tickets. Our competitions are deliberately limited to keep odds low & your chance of winning fair. Authenticity Guarantee Every watch is thoroughly inspected & fully authenticated by our in-house expert. We are professionals, not enthusiasts or hobbyists. Guaranteed Draws Every draw ends on the stated date, no matter what. We never extend our competitions, even if we haven't sold all the tickets. The watch is absolutely stunning. It’s got that classic charm and you can feel the history in every detail. The condition is immaculate for a piece of its age.
